put.summary: Authorize a pending card charge. Use after receiving requires_pin, requires_otp, or requires_additional_fields from initiate.

post.summary: Initiate a bank account transfer (payout). Debits your Flutterwave wallet and sends to recipient bank account.
Initiate a mobile money transfer (payout). Debits your Flutterwave wallet and sends to recipient mobile wallet.
Card refunds are completed between 3-15 days after the refund is initiated. Refunds to mobile money wallets take 3-5 days, while refunds to bank accounts are completed in 24 hours.

get.description: Creates/updates the current-period invoice for manual payment via hosted checkout. The system computes the amount from plan pricing and current billable seats (including any seat overage). VAT is not applied in this version. Requires a logged-in user context; frontend must NOT send amount.

info.title: Fluide Pay API
info.description: Digital wallets, transactions, and payment provider integrations (Ecobank, mobile money). Supports async settlement via Kafka. In the API playground, click Authorize and provide Bearer JWT, X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id (fluide-developer).

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint in text exposition format. Configure your metrics collector to poll this path on each service.

bearer.description: Access token JWT. Use as Authorization: Bearer <token>. In the API playground, paste the JWT only.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every API call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret used only during token exchange. Never send on product routes.

type.description: The type of transfer recipient (e.g., bank_egp, mobile_money_ghs, etc.)

bank.description: The bank details for the recipient.

mobile_money.description: The mobile money details for the recipient.

recipient_id.description: The ID of the saved recipient

sender_id.description: Optional Flutterwave v4 sender entity id

customer_id.description: ID of the customer this virtual account belongs to.

amount.description: Amount to collect. Use 0 for static accounts, >0 for dynamic.

account_type.description: Must be "static" when amount=0, "dynamic" when amount>0.

expiry.description: Expiry in seconds (60–31536000). Required when account_type is dynamic.

narration.description: Name shown when the account is resolved.

bvn.description: Customer's Bank Verification Number. Required for NGN static accounts.

customer_account_number.description: Bank account the transfer originates from. Required for EGP and KES.

card_number.description: Plain card number — encrypted by backend before sending to Flutterwave

card.description: Plain card details — backend encrypts before forwarding

recurring.description: Set true for recurring/tokenized charges — skips authorization flow

scenarioKey.description: Flutterwave sandbox scenario key for testing auth models

pin.description: Customer PIN — backend encrypts before sending

code.description: Bank code — required for NGN and most African currency transfers

routing_number.description: Routing number — required for some international transfers (e.g. USD, AUD)

swift_code.description: SWIFT code — required for international transfers

source_currency.description: Currency of your Flutterwave wallet being debited

network.description: Mobile money network e.g. MTN, Mpesa, Airtel, Vodafone

msisdn.description: Recipient mobile number with country code prefix e.g. 233 for Ghana

country.description: Required for XAF and XOF transfers

amount.description: Amount to refund (must be ≤ original charge amount)

firstName.description: First name of the account holder

middlename.description: Middle name of the account holder

lastName.description: Last name of the account holder

mobileNo.description: Mobile number of the account holder

email.description: email address of the account holder

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in date-time format

identityType.description: ID type of the account holder

identityNo.description: ID number of the account holder

idIssueDate.description: ID issue date in date-time format

idExpiryDate.description: ID card expiration date in date-time format

street.description: street address of the account holder

currency.description: The currency code for the payment

amount.description: The amount to be charged in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD)

currency.description: The currency in which the payment is made (e.g., xaf)

paymentMethodType.description: The type of payment method to be used (e.g., card)

amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (e.g. cents)

metadata.description: Opaque metadata to propagate to Stripe objects
Opaque JSON metadata attached to the corridor row

providerCustomerId.description: External provider customer id (Stripe customer / Flutterwave customer)

providerSubscriptionId.description: External provider recurring contract id where applicable (e.g. Stripe)

plan.description: Used to create billing row if missing.

countryCode.description: Mobile money country calling code (digits only).

scenarioKey.description: Optional Flutterwave scenario key for sandbox testing.

redirectUrl.description: Absolute redirect URL Flutterwave sends the user back to after authorization.

debug.description: When true, include sanitized Flutterwave request/response payloads for debugging.
